subject: Excadrill — large bipedal mole-like creature with prominent claws and drill features, standing in rocky terrain
description: A large, imposing bipedal creature stands in a rocky canyon or cave environment. Its body is dark with contrasting lighter markings, and it has prominent oversized claws on its forelimbs. The figure faces somewhat forward with a powerful, aggressive stance. Rocky brown and grey formations fill the background. The creature's design evokes drilling and burrowing.
foreground: large dark bipedal creature with prominent claws, drill-like features
background: rocky canyon, brown and grey stone formations
